title: SCP-2521, ●●|●●●●●|●●|●
description: A mysterious black figure that appears when its own number is written or spoken.
body:
●●|●●●●●|●●|● adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-2521, also known as the ●●|●●●●●|●●|●. 


SCP-2521 is a mysterious entity that appears when its own number is mentioned. This creature is fast, invincible, and able to move through walls and instantly teleporting to its target. Once it reaches a victim, it drags them into the void before disappearing again. Be careful what you type, even writing 2521 accidentally in chat through coordinates or else can summon it.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Why are signs and books unaffected by SCP-2521?

Signs and books are unaffected from SCP-2521 due to MCreators limitations. I tried to add this mechanic but wasn't able to make it. At least the chat function works.

► Where does SCP-2521 spawn?

SCP-2521 only spawns if a player writes the numbers "2521" in the chat or has a book called "2521" in it's main hand.

</details>



![SCP-2521](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48c4c16de4a525c24d153b865d1994b291b4f6f8_0.webp)

SCP-2521 is a tall, pitch-black humanoid with long, flowing tentacles and a heart symbol on its head. It manifests whenever the numbers 2521 are written in chat or appears in a signed book’s title, regardless of what surrounds the number. Even coordinates or random messages containing 2521 can summon it. Once spawned, SCP-2521 moves quickly, phases through walls, and cannot be harmed or contained. If its target is more than 15 blocks away, it teleports instantly to them. Upon reaching its victim, it drags them into the void before vanishing.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
